tags.name: uui-toggle
tags.description: Umbraco Toggle-switch, toggles between off/on. Technically a checkbox.

attributes.name: label-position
attributes.description: Specifies the label position of the checkbox or the toggle

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description:
Reflects the state of the element.
True if checkbox or toggle is checked. Change this to switch the state programmatically.

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: Sets the input to readonly mode, meaning value cannot be changed but still able to read and select its content.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: This is a name property of the component.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: intentional overwrite of FormControlMixins value getter and setter method.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Apply validation rule for requiring a value of this form control.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: Apply custom error on this input.

attributes.name: pristine
attributes.description: Determines wether the form control has been touched or interacted with, this determines wether the validation-status of this form control should be made visible.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Label to be used for aria-label and potentially as visual label for some components

properties.name: labelPosition
properties.description: Specifies the label position of the checkbox or the toggle

properties.name: checked
properties.description:
Reflects the state of the element.
True if checkbox or toggle is checked. Change this to switch the state programmatically.

properties.name: readonly
properties.description: Sets the input to readonly mode, meaning value cannot be changed but still able to read and select its content.

properties.name: formAssociated
properties.description: This is a static class field indicating that the element is can be used inside a native form and participate in its events. It may require a polyfill, check support here https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/HTMLElement/attachInternals.  Read more about form controls here https://web.dev/more-capable-form-controls/

properties.name: name
properties.description: This is a name property of the component.

properties.name: required
properties.description: Apply validation rule for requiring a value of this form control.

properties.name: error
properties.description: Apply custom error on this input.

properties.name: pristine
properties.description: Determines wether the form control has been touched or interacted with, this determines wether the validation-status of this form control should be made visible.

properties.name: label
properties.description: Label to be used for aria-label and potentially as visual label for some components

events.name: change-
events.description: fires when the element is begin checked by a user action

cssProperties.name: --uui-toggle-border-color-hover
cssProperties.description: Set the toggle background color when hovered

cssProperties.name: --uui-toggle-background-color-hover
cssProperties.description: Set the toggle background color when hovered
